skills.title: Handle dynamic content loading in web scraping
skills.content:
- Wait for network idle before extracting content, not just DOM ready
- Use page.waitForSelector() with a timeout of 10s for lazy-loaded elements
- Check for infinite scroll patterns: monitor DOM mutation count over 2s window
- Prefer page.evaluate() over page.$() for complex DOM traversals in shadow DOMs

skills.title: Rate limiting and retry strategies for API calls
skills.content:
- Implement exponential backoff starting at 1s, max 30s, with jitter
- Respect Retry-After headers when present; fall back to exponential backoff otherwise
- Log rate limit events for later analysis of API usage patterns
- Use HTTP 429 status code as the canonical rate limit signal

skills.title: Structured data extraction from HTML tables
skills.content:
- Identify table headers first; use them as keys for row dictionaries
- Handle colspan/rowspan by expanding merged cells before extraction
- Strip whitespace and normalize unicode in cell text (NFKC normalization)
- Detect pagination in tables: look for 'next', 'page', or numbered links near the table
